backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state, serving as a placeholder entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to convert the CTA button in HowItWorksSection.tsx into an anchor linking to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' in a new tab.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing their purpose and key recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with the page title 'Poppo Live Agency', meta description, and og:site_name tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full landing page by rendering Navbar, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, AppPreviewSection, HowItWorksSection, StatsSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AppPreviewSectio: App preview section with a split layout featuring feature highlights, a CTA anchor linking to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D', and App Store/Google Play download badges.
Six-card features grid highlighting Go Live, Earn Rewards, Gifts, Voice Calls, PK Battles, and Global Community with gradient icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the Poppo Live Agency logo, navigation link columns, social media icons, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, gradient overlays, headline, and CTA buttons for becoming a Poppo Agent, WhatsApp contact, and app store downloads.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Four-step onboarding section (Download, Create Account, Go Live, Connect & Earn) displayed in a grid with icons, descriptions, and a CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed responsive navbar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, WhatsApp and Apply Now CTA buttons, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Community stats section displaying four animated counters (users, countries, streams, creators) with intersection-observer-triggered count-up animations and a testimonial block.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity or an anonymous identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, used for a static landing page.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollPosition.ts: Custom hook that tracks and returns the current window vertical scroll position using a passive scroll event listener.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines dark-theme CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens), component utilities (gradient buttons, glow shadows), and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps oklch CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, and enables typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and the current task: updating the HowItWorksSection CTA button to an anchor linking to livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/ in a new tab.
